## Summary

<!-- A short description of the effect(s) being added or changed. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] I placed the `.spn` source and the matching `.json` metadata file in the correct category folder under `effects/` (see [`README.md`](../README.md#contributing-an-effect) for the layout).
- [ ] The metadata `id` field matches the filename (kebab-case, no extension).
- [ ] All three pots have a clear `name` and `description` (or the metadata explains that a pot is unused).
- [ ] I tested the effect on an Easy Spin pedal (or a compatible FV-1 platform).
- [ ] I am the original author of this effect, or I have permission to contribute it under the license listed in the metadata.
- [ ] I did **not** edit `effects/index.json` by hand — it is regenerated automatically on merge.

## Notes for reviewers

<!-- Anything useful to know: suggested settings, known quirks, inspiration, upstream credits, etc. -->
